name: Tennis Abstract (Sackmann)
description: Jeff Sackmann's open tennis dataset — the deepest free ATP/WTA history available. Every tour-level match since 1968 (date, surface, round, score, winner/loser, and per-match stats like aces/double-faults/break points), plus the full player registry and weekly ranking history. Completely free, no API key, no signup — it's served as raw CSV files from GitHub (github.com/JeffSackmann). IMPORTANT: every tool returns CSV text, NOT JSON — the consumer (market-intel) parses the CSV to compute head-to-head records, recent form, and ranking lookups. Files are per-year (matches) or per-decade (rankings); the decade ranking files are large, so prefer the *_rankings_current tool for live ranks. Data is CC-licensed for non-commercial use; attribute Jeff Sackmann / Tennis Abstract. See https://github.com/JeffSackmann/tennis_atp for the schema (the column header is the first CSV row).

tools.name: atp_matches
tools.description: Every ATP tour-level match in a given year as CSV. Columns include tourney_date, surface (Hard/Clay/Grass/Carpet), round, winner_name, loser_name, score, plus serve/return stats. The raw material for ATP head-to-head + recent-form computation. Returns CSV text.

year.description: Four-digit year, e.g. 2024. One file per year; fetch each year you need.

tools.name: wta_matches
tools.description: Every WTA tour-level match in a given year as CSV — same schema as atp_matches. The raw material for WTA head-to-head + recent-form. Returns CSV text.

tools.name: atp_rankings_current
tools.description: The most recent ATP ranking snapshot as CSV — ranking_date, rank, player id, points. Small + fast; use this for live rank lookups instead of the bulky decade files. Join player ids against atp_players for names. Returns CSV text.

tools.name: wta_rankings_current
tools.description: The most recent WTA ranking snapshot as CSV — same schema as atp_rankings_current. Returns CSV text.

tools.name: atp_rankings_decade
tools.description: Full weekly ATP ranking history for a decade as CSV (ranking_date, rank, player, points). LARGE file — only fetch when you need historical ranks (e.g. a player's rank at a past match date); for current rank use atp_rankings_current. Returns CSV text.

decade.description: Two-digit decade start, e.g. '20' for the 2020s, '10' for the 2010s, '00' for the 2000s, '90' for the 1990s.

tools.name: wta_rankings_decade
tools.description: Full weekly WTA ranking history for a decade as CSV. LARGE file — prefer wta_rankings_current for live ranks. Returns CSV text.

decade.description: Two-digit decade start, e.g. '20' for the 2020s.

tools.name: atp_players
tools.description: The full ATP player registry as CSV — player_id, first/last name, hand, date of birth, country, height. Use to resolve a player name to the id used across the match + ranking files. Returns CSV text (a large but one-time lookup).

tools.name: wta_players
tools.description: The full WTA player registry as CSV — same schema as atp_players. Returns CSV text.
